title: bidens pilosa
intro: Bidens pilosa, also known as the sticky jojoba or beggar ticks, is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids and triterpenoids. The health benefits of Bidens pilosa include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and reduce blood sugar levels. Bidens pilosa can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and its roots and leaves are often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being.
